name: Steamed Parsleyed Potatoes with Cucumbers
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a sharp knife, cut the potatoes in half and peel some of the skin off, leaving a band in the center for color.
2. Trim the ends of the cucumbers and remove some or all of the peel if desired. Slice into 2-inch thick rounds. Quarter each slice lengthwise and remove the seeds.
3. Steam the potatoes for about 10 minutes. Add the cucumbers and steam for an additional 3 minutes. Do not overcook.
4. Heat olive oil in a large saucepan. Add the potatoes, cucumbers, salt, pepper, and lemon juice. Toss and heat for 30 seconds before serving. Alternatively, omit the oil and season the potatoes and cucumbers with salt, pepper, and lemon juice before serving.
POTATOES: Fingerlings, Yukon Golds, Sweet (not yam), Peruvian Blue.
Variation: Remove 4 strips of the peel from cucumber, then cut into fourths through the exposed strips. Cut into 2 to 2-1/2 inch fingers.
